headline: Assessing DaVita (DVA) Valuation After Strong Q1 2026 Beat And Upgraded Guidance
summary: DaVita (DVA) is back in focus after first quarter 2026 revenue and earnings surpassed analysts' expectations, prompting management to lift full year guidance and drawing fresh attention from investors and research desks. See our latest analysis for DaVita. The strong first quarter has come after a powerful run in the stock, with the share price up 27.46% over 90 days and a 67.81% year to date share price return. The 3 year total shareholder return of 97.13% suggests longer term holders have...
